task:
Build this app in Clear:

**User Profiles** (Level 5)

Build a user registration/login system with profiles. POST /api/register (email, password, name). POST /api/login returns token. GET /api/me returns current user profile (requires auth). PUT /api/me updates profile name.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/
final_source:
/*
ARCHITECTURE:

User Registration/Login System
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      register      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      save      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Browser   в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖPOSTв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ Backend  в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ   DB   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (form)    в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ201в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ (server) в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ(memory)в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                 в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
      в”Ӯ                                  в”Ӯ
      в”Ӯ  POST /api/login                 в”Ӯ  compare password
      в”Ӯ  в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  generate token
      в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ200 + tokenв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ӯ
      в”Ӯ
      в”Ӯ  GET /api/me (+ token)           в”Ӯ
      в”Ӯ  в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  requires login
      в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ200 + current userв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ӯ

Table: Users (id, email, password, name, created_at)
Auth: password stored as plain (for MVP), token via Bearer header
*/

build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

when user sends data to /api/register:
  validate data:
    email must not be empty
    password must not be empty
    name must not be empty
  saved = save data to Users
  send back saved with status 201

when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  user = look up User with credentials's email
  if user's password is credentials's password:
    send back { token: 'jwt-token-123' } with status 200
  else:
    send back 'Invalid credentials' with status 401

when user calls GET /api/me:
  requires login
  me = look up User with this id
  send back me with status 200

when user calls PUT /api/me sending update_data:
  requires login
  update = save update_data to Users with this id
  send back update with status 200
